purpose: Run the low-cost market-moving digest pipeline: collect a bounded feed allowlist, normalize + dedupe + score observations, and emit local-only digest files on schedule without background model turns.

wakeContract.executionModel: OS cron should call the script directly; do not wake an OpenClaw model turn for the default recurring path.
wakeContract.successRule: Keep it local-only in v1. No user-facing push path until digest quality is proven stable.
wakeContract.efficiencyRule: Prefer HTTP conditional requests, deterministic scoring, and threshold-gated digest emission over any always-on model loop.
